title: Senior B2B Strategy Manager (m/w/d)
required_skills: Minimum 3-4 years of experience at a top strategy consulting firm (Tier 1 or Tier 2) OR comparable Corporate Development/Strategy function in an FMCG company or FMCG start-up/scale-up
Demonstrable track record managing complex projects with multiple stakeholders and measurable commercial outcomes
Direct C-level advisory experience and independent ownership of high-relevance cross-functional workstreams
Strong analytical and strategic depth: data-driven, hypothesis-driven problem solving
Process discipline, reporting rigour, and milestone accountability
Willingness to travel 1-2x per quarter within Europe
bonus_skills: Experience with AI tools and building AI roadmaps
Experience with B2B business intelligence frameworks (Looker, Nielsen)
OKR management and steering committee governance
matched_skills: Demonstrable track record in complex multi-stakeholder projects: HSBC 6-workstream USD 8M programme, cross-functional coordination at Hapag-Lloyd — satisfies project management with stakeholders requirement
C-suite advisory: direct interface with C-suite at HSBC for programme governance and investment decisions — partially satisfies C-level advisory requirement
Analytical and data-driven: KPI dashboards, budget variance analysis, data storytelling — satisfies analytical depth requirement
Process discipline and reporting rigour: weekly burn-rate reports, governance documentation at HSBC — satisfies reporting/milestone requirement
Google Looker Studio experience — partially satisfies Looker BI framework bonus
AI tool usage (ChatGPT, Claude) — partially satisfies AI tools bonus
missing_skills: No strategy consulting background (Tier 1 or Tier 2) — this is the primary experience gate
No FMCG corporate strategy experience (pet food/consumer goods industry is entirely new)
German B1 is far below negotiation-level German required
No OKR framework or steering committee governance in a commercial strategy context
No B2B sales strategy or revenue-generating strategic initiative ownership
No P&L impact at the stated scale (EUR 500k-1M+ revenue scope)
core_responsibilities: Steer complex, cross-regional B2B projects with high P&L impact (EUR 500k-1M+ scope) from strategic scoping to executive-level execution
Own full project accountability from scoping to execution across one or more B2B markets
Lead commercial integration of newly acquired companies: shape roadmaps and manage cross-regional teams
Own overarching B2B Business Intelligence framework (Looker, Nielsen); define global KPIs and data governance standards
Act as AI champion for global B2B sales: identify, evaluate and integrate next-generation commercial intelligence tools
Manage OKR rhythm from regional to global; govern steering committees
Co-develop global 3-year B2B strategy including go-to-market architectures for multi-market expansions
recommended_emphasis: The German language gap (B1 vs negotiation-level) is a near-disqualifying barrier for a role requiring constant cross-regional stakeholder management in German
Without consulting or FMCG Corporate Development experience, the primary experience gate is not met
If applying, anchor the narrative on the HSBC C-suite programme governance as the closest evidence of strategic project ownership with commercial impact
Highlight Looker Studio and AI tool usage to partially cover the BI and AI champion bonus requirements
summary: Weak match at 36.4%. The candidate demonstrates genuine multi-stakeholder project governance, C-suite interface experience, and analytical rigour — transferable skills that partially overlap with what this role needs. However, the two primary gates — strategy consulting pedigree and negotiation-level German — are both absent. Without these, combined with no FMCG, M&A, or OKR governance background, the application risk is high. Only advisable if the candidate has a compelling personal narrative for the domain pivot.
